mapper.select: SELECT cart.id, cart.user_id, cart.good_id, cart.standard, cart.count, cart.create_time, good.name, good.imgs, good.discount, COALESCE(gs.price, (SELECT price FROM good_standard WHERE good_id = cart.good_id LIMIT 1)) as price, COALESCE(gs.store, (SELECT store FROM good_standard WHERE good_id = cart.good_id LIMIT 1)) as store FROM cart LEFT JOIN good ON cart.good_id = good.id LEFT JOIN good_standard gs ON cart.good_id = gs.good_id AND cart.standard = gs.value WHERE cart.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY cart.create_time DESC
